description_long: This is a modern, rectangular lounge sofa with a clean, minimalist design, upholstered in a light, solid-colored fabric. The sofa features a single, continuous seat cushion and a series of loose, generously sized back cushions, some in matching tones and others in a contrasting, muted color. The armrests are straight, wide, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a boxy silhouette. The legs are short, barely visible, and likely made of dark wood or metal, providing subtle elevation above the ground. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or tufting, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. This lounge would be suitable for urban parks, public plazas, or upscale outdoor waiting areas.
description: A modern, boxy lounge sofa with light upholstery, loose back cushions, and wide padded armrests. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with subtle contrasting cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, seat, and arrangement of cushions with armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth, straight armrest, and layered back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest height and the alignment of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the front and side, emphasizing the boxy shape and cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six loose back cushions in two colors, three on each side, with a single long seat cushion; cushions are large and plush, not attached.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with no tufting or segmentation, supporting loose cushions for comfort.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, wide, padded, and matching the backrest height for a boxy look.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky legs, likely wood or metal, dark-colored, minimally visible, and straight.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
